title: Composing a Graphics Transform Chain with Fewest Scalar Multiplies
strategies: naive: materialize every stage densely, fold left-to-right (baseline)
greedy: matrix-chain DP reorder over the dense stage matrices
strong: flatten low-rank factors into the chain + DP over all factors
open: also distribute SUMLR sums (A+B.C) through the chain (not done by strong)
